---
title: "RECASTed papers"
description: "Four published econometrics results, each replicated, extended with causal ML, AI-refereed, and reported honestly."
listing:
  id: recast-papers
  contents: papers/*/index.qmd
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, title, author, date, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    author: "Original authors"
    date: "Year"
    description: "Identification"
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: [title, categories]
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  categories: true
  image-height: "180px"
toc: false
---

Each paper below was put through the full RECAST pipeline — exact (or honestly
tiered) replication of the original result, a causal-ML extension under the
*inherited* identification, a two-referee AI review, and a verdict that states
plainly what the machine learning did and did not add. The category pills mark
the **method path** (PLR / IRM / PLIV), the topic, and the review verdict.

::: {#recast-papers}
:::
